diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,169 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: Hono, HonoOptions, Env, H, HandlerResponse, Input, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MiddlewareHandler
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating Hono app instances and middleware with handler composition support.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Context, GET_MATCH_RESULT, RouterRoute, getPattern, splitRoutingPath
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
+- Safe summary: Helper to get route information including matched routes, paths, and base paths from the request context.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: Context, MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse, StatusCode
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/utils/http-status
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for upgrading HTTP connections and managing WebSocket events and messages.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: Context, parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper for reading and writing cookies from and to request/response objects.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: hc (from src/client), Client, ClientRequestOptions, ExecutionContext
+- Neighbor files: src/client, src/client/types, src/context, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper for creating test clients that wrap Hono apps with custom fetch functions.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, Runtime
+- Reads as: Context
+- Neighbor files: src/context
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper for detecting runtime environments and accessing environment-specific bindings.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style
+- Reads as: raw (from src/helper/html), DOM_RENDERER (from src/jsx/constants), createCssJsxDomObjects (from src/jsx/dom/css), HtmlEscapedCallback, HtmlEscapedString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for dynamic stylesheet generation with class name hashing and view transitions.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES, rawCssString, minify, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: CssEscapedString
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Shared CSS utility functions for styling, class name generation, and style string processing.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, ProxyFetch
+- Reads as: HTTPException
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding requests to external servers with RFC-compliant header handling.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Hono, Env, RouterRoute, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware, getColorEnabled
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Development helper for displaying routes, middleware, and handler information in formatted tables.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: escapeToBuffer, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML generation helper with automatic HTML escaping and async callback support.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg, x-hono-disable-ssg, onlySSG, disableSSG
+- Reads as: ssg.ts, middleware.ts, plugins.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Entry point for SSG helper that re-exports main functionality including plugin system.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGResult, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface
+- Reads as: replaceUrlParam, Hono, Env, Schema, createPool, getExtension, joinPaths, dirname, ensureWithinOutDir, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, defaultPlugin
+- Neighbor files: src/client/utils, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Server-side rendering helper for generating static HTML files from Hono apps with route fetching and file persistence.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: Hono, METHOD_NAME_ALL, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/router, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for path operations, route filtering, and SSG-specific validation.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSGParams
+- Reads as: Context, Env, MiddlewareHandler, isDynamicRoute
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware for adding static generation parameters, checking SSG context, and controlling static generation behavior.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: sse, text
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Entry point for streaming helper that re-exports stream, SSE streaming, and text streaming.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts\
